nexus: Sourcing Archaeological Materials by Chemical Composition

Source: R/nexus-package.R
nexus-package.Rd

Exploration and analysis of compositional data in the framework of Aitchison (1986) <isbn: 9780412280603>. This package provides tools for chemical fingerprinting and source tracking of ancient materials.

Details

Package:nexus
Type:Package
Version:0.0.0.9000
License:GPL-3
Zenodo:

Package options

nexus uses the following options() to configure behavior:

  • nexus.autodetect: a logical scalar. Try to automatically assign values to the corresponding slot of a CompositionMatrix object when coercing a data.frame? Defaults to TRUE.

  • nexus.verbose: a logical scalar. Should R report extra information on progress? Defaults to TRUE.

See also

Useful links:

  • https://packages.tesselle.org/nexus/

  • https://github.com/tesselle/nexus,

  • Report bugs at https://github.com/tesselle/nexus/issues

On this page

nexus is a part of the tesselle project, a collection of packages for research and teaching in archaeology. Learn more at tesselle.org.

Developed by Nicolas Frerebeau, Anne Philippe.
